metadata.title: Contact — Remix
metadata.description: Get in touch with the Remix team. Report bugs, request features, or reach out for collaborations and partnerships.

hero.title: Contact us
hero.description: Please make an issue in our GitHub repo to report a bug or to make a feature request. Your feedback is deeply appreciated by the Remix team.

help.title: How can we help?
help.description: If you have other questions, or want to reach out to us about collaborations or partnerships, use the options below.
